title: Metrics Dashboard
description: ARCHETYPE: dashboard. Shape: web + backend, has a PAGE, and that page MUST contain 3 CHART nodes (2 is the threshold for 'dashboard' archetype; this task deliberately wants 3 to stress it). The distinguishing signal from kpi: multiple charts, not headline numbers. DO NOT build a KPI page with just `display sum_of_amount` — you must use actual `chart 'Title' as pie showing data` / `chart 'Title' as line showing data` / `chart 'Title' as bar showing data` nodes. Orders table has amount (number, required), status (default 'pending'), created_at_date (auto). Auth required: login-gate the dashboard page and POST /api/orders. Need: POST /api/orders (auth, creates), GET /api/orders (lists), page '/' (login-gated, shows 3 charts: pie of status breakdown, line of orders over time, bar of amount by status).
skeleton:
build for web and javascript backend

create a Orders table:
  amount (number), required
  status, default 'pending'
  created_at_date, auto

allow signup and login

# Endpoints + dashboard page with 3 charts here
# Use: chart of Orders by status — chart of Orders by amount — etc.
